common.preferencesNote: *Preferences use cookies by default. You can switch between cookies, localStorage, or no storage in code.

autoFormExample.title: AutoForm Example
autoFormExample.description: Auto-generated forms from Zod schemas with i18n labels, placeholders, and validation.
autoFormExample.sectionBasicDescription: String, number, email, select (enum), textarea, and checkbox inputs.
autoFormExample.sectionAdvancedDescription: Date picker, radio group, switch, multi-checkbox, multi-select, combobox, and slider.
autoFormExample.createDescription: Fill in the details to create a new entry.
autoFormExample.advancedCreateDescription: Rich input fields including pickers, multi-select, and slider.
autoFormExample.submittedDescription: The form was submitted with the following values:
autoFormExample.fieldEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
autoFormExample.fieldExperienceDescription: Drag the slider to set your experience level.
autoFormExample.sectionDateDescription: Calendar popover with dd/MM/yyyy format, locale-aware names, min/max range, disabled weekends, and blocked dates.
autoFormExample.dateVariantBasicDescription: Plain date picker — all dates allowed, dd/MM/yyyy display, locale-aware month/day names, year+month dropdown.
autoFormExample.dateVariantRangeDescription: Dates outside 2026 are greyed out and unselectable. Demonstrates customData: '{' min, max '}'.
autoFormExample.dateVariantBusinessDescription: Saturday and Sunday are disabled. Demonstrates customData: '{' disableWeekends: true '}'.
autoFormExample.dateVariantHolidayDescription: Public holidays are blocked. Demonstrates customData: '{' disabledDates: ['yyyy-MM-dd', …] '}'.
autoFormExample.sectionLayoutDescription: Control field arrangement with a custom Form component (CSS grid) and per-field column spans via customData.className.
autoFormExample.layoutVariant1Description: The default Form renders a vertical stack (space-y-4). No configuration needed.
autoFormExample.layoutVariant2Description: Pass uiComponents='{{' Form: TwoColumnForm '}}' to switch to a 2-col grid. All fields auto-fill one column each.
autoFormExample.layoutVariant3Description: Combine uiComponents='{{' Form: TwoColumnForm '}}' with customData: '{' className: 'col-span-2' '}' on specific fields to make them span the full width.
autoFormExample.sectionUploadAsyncDescription: Drag-and-drop file upload with image/PDF preview and a combobox that fetches its options from an API via TanStack Query.
autoFormExample.uploadVariant1Description: Accepts images only, 2 MB limit. Previews the selected image inline. Uses fieldType: "file-upload" with customData: '{' accept, maxSizeMB '}'.
autoFormExample.uploadVariant2Description: Accepts images and PDFs, up to 3 files, 5 MB each. Demonstrates customData: '{' multiple: true, maxFiles: 3 '}'.
autoFormExample.uploadVariant3Description: Options are loaded from a (simulated) API when the dropdown first opens, cached for 5 minutes by TanStack Query. Uses fieldType: "async-combobox" with customData: '{' queryKey, queryFn '}'.
autoFormExample.fieldAvatarDescription: Upload a profile picture (PNG, JPG, WebP — max 2 MB).
autoFormExample.fieldDocumentsDescription: Upload up to 3 images or PDF files (max 5 MB each).

errors.unauthorizedDescription: You need to be authenticated to access this page. Please sign in to continue.
errors.forbiddenDescription: You don't have permission to access this resource. Contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.
errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.internalServerErrorDescription: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.
errors.maintenanceDescription: We're performing scheduled maintenance. Please check back later. We apologize for the inconvenience.
errors.maintenanceNote: Expected to be back online shortly.

tableExample.title: DataTable Example
tableExample.description: Sortable, filterable, paginated tables powered by TanStack Table v8, useDataTable hook, and nuqs URL state sync.
tableExample.sectionFullDescription: A complete table with text, multiSelect, select, range (slider), and date filters; column sorting; column pinning; column visibility toggle; row selection with a floating ActionBar; and pagination — all URL-synced via nuqs.
tableExample.fullVariantDescription: 20 mock courses. Try filtering, sorting, hiding columns, selecting rows, and changing the page size — all state is reflected in the URL.
tableExample.sectionFiltersDescription: The DataTableToolbar auto-detects the filter UI from each column's meta.variant. Five variants are demonstrated in this table.
tableExample.filterTextDescription: A plain text input. Assign variant: 'text' and an optional placeholder in column meta. The filter value is debounced and synced to a URL query param.
tableExample.filterMultiSelectDescription: A faceted-count popover allowing multiple values. Assign variant: 'multiSelect' with an options array. Used for category and status columns.
tableExample.filterRangeDescription: A dual-handle slider. Assign variant: 'range' and a range: [min, max] tuple in column meta. Used for enrollments and rating.
tableExample.filterDateDescription: A calendar popover for exact-date matching. Assign variant: 'date'. Use variant: 'dateRange' for a start/end range picker.
tableExample.filterSelectDescription: Single-value faceted popover. Same component as multiSelect but allows only one active option. Used for the Free/Paid column.
tableExample.sectionColumnsDescription: Column behaviour is configured via the ColumnDef. All column-level capabilities below are available out of the box via useDataTable.
tableExample.sectionPinDescription: Pass column ids to initialState.columnPinning.left or .right to keep them fixed while the table scrolls horizontally. Pinned columns receive position: sticky, an automatic left/right offset, a background fill, and a subtle box-shadow separator.
tableExample.pinLeftDescription: select, index, and title stay fixed on the left. Scroll the table right to see the other columns slide underneath them.
tableExample.pinRightDescription: The actions column is pinned to the right edge. It stays visible no matter how far left you scroll.
tableExample.colFeatureSortDescription: Click any column header to toggle asc/desc sort. Disabled per-column with enableSorting: false. Sort state is synced to the URL.
tableExample.colFeatureHideDescription: Click the View button in the toolbar to show/hide columns. Opt-out with enableHiding: false (used on select, index, actions columns).
tableExample.colFeaturePinDescription: Columns passed to initialState.columnPinning.left stay fixed while the table scrolls horizontally. Pinned columns get a sticky box-shadow.
tableExample.sectionRowsDescription: Row-level capabilities — selection, bulk actions, pagination, and URL state — work together through the useDataTable hook.
tableExample.rowFeatureSelectDescription: Add a checkbox column (id: 'select') with header/cell toggle callbacks. Track selection with table.getFilteredSelectedRowModel().rows.
tableExample.rowFeatureActionBarDescription: Pass actionBar prop to '<DataTable>'. The bar slides in when rows are selected and slides out when the selection is cleared or the X button is clicked.
tableExample.rowFeaturePaginationDescription: The DataTablePagination component renders first/prev/next/last controls and a rows-per-page selector. pageCount: -1 = client-side; pageCount: n = server-side.
tableExample.rowFeatureUrlDescription: Page, perPage, sort, and all filter values are stored in URL query params by the useDataTable hook via nuqs. Bookmarkable and shareable.
